title: Dangote Group to build 3 million metric tons, valued $2.5bn fertiliser plant in Ethiopia …Will maintain 60% ownership - FinancialEDGE
description: Ethiopian Investment Holdings (EIH), the strategic investment arm of the Government of Ethiopia, and Dangote Group have announced the signing of a comprehensive shareholders' agreement to develop, construct, and operate a world-class urea fertilizer production complex in Gode, Ethiopia. Under the partnership structure, EIH will hold a 40% equity stake while Dangote Group will maintain
